CustomField.description: The flat amount entered in this field is directly deducted from the agreed value for each reduction schedule. For example, with an agreed value of 10,000,000 and a flat amount of 100,000, the agreed value will be reduced by 100,000 in each schedule period.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The flat amount entered in this field will be directly deducted from the agreed value for each reduction schedule. For example, if the agreed value is 10,000,000 and the flat amount is 100,000, then 100,000 will be reduced from the agreed value for each schedule period.
CustomField.label: AV Reduction ($)
